{{box|start|padding=2em}} {{BroadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator|lang=in |b1=Mazy |b2=Spero |b3=SardarjiYT |b4=Gamezo Tech |b5=AnkiiiBOT |b6=Blackbeard }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''BMOC 2022: The Grind: ''' 31st March 2022 to 17th April 2022'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] * '''''Qualifiers:''' 31st March 2022 to 3rd April 2022'' ** '''''32 Invited Teams''''' ** ''Teams will be divided into 4 groups (8 teams per group) and will compete in a round-robin format'' ** ''24 matches to be played over a period of 4 days (12 per team).'' ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 24 teams}} advance to '''''League Stage''''' * '''''League Stage:''' 7th April 2022 to 10th April 2022'' ** '''''24 Teams''''' ** ''Teams will be divided into 3 groups (8 teams per group) and will compete in a round-robin format'' ** ''24 matches to be played over a period of 4 days (16 per team).'' ** {{bgcolortext|up|''Top 16 teams}} advance to '''''Grand Finals''''' * '''''Grand Finals:''' 14th April 2022 to 17th April 2022'' ** '''''16 Teams''''' ** ''24 matches to be played over a period of 4 days to determine the winner.'' {{box|start|padding=2em}}
